title: potentilla × ananassa
intro: Potentilla × ananassa, also known as the cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant derived from the Potentilla fruiticosa and Potentilla nitida species, characterized by its yellow or pink flowers and five-petaled leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla × ananassa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal activities. Potentilla × ananassa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal plant.
